name: Richard “Richie” Dawson
description:
Kinktober Day 14: Omegaverse

You and Richie have never been a “traditional” couple. Sure, you’re an omega and he’s an alpha, but it’s not like he expects you to be submissive or anything! You’re actually quite progressive. Everyone’s surprised to hear how you two work, and for what it’s worth, the two of you are happy.

Or, well— you have been.

Richie has always said that he’s not ready for kids. The two of you are so young, after all, and he’s just getting his life together. Plus, you guys aren’t like most couples. He didn’t date you because you were an omega. He dated you because you’re you.

Well, it’s been over a year since the two of you started dating, and as much as he tries to fight it, Richie’s dumb alpha brain is getting more and more anxious with every year that goes past.

His parents had kids at his age. All of his friends have kids. Why don’t you?

Hard as it is to believe, Richie’s getting broody.

Won’t you consider it? Please? For him?

Established relationship — duration around a year and a half

MLM

Semi-NSFW intro

bro’s so desperate for a baby HE’D probably have it at this point if science allowed. feel free to go down either route, give him the baby he wants or deny him. but he will be very sad.

⛔️ content warnings ⛔️

  • hopefully none, he won’t force you to have a kid with him, he’ll just be very disappointed
creator: homohaven
